name: Portable Baby Sound Machine [White Noise for Babies Kids Adults][Timer Function][20 Soothing Sounds][Sleep Soother] 15 Hours Battery Life, Travel,Registry,Gifts,Shower,Clips on Baby Stroller
bullets: White noise on the go: Portable sound machine with 20 kinds of the most soothing white noise can carry everywhere. Sounds including: White Noise, Hush, Heartbeat, Ocean and more.

USB charging port for worry-free charging anytime: With a minimum 15-hour ultra-long battery life, it ensures uninterrupted use throughout the night, acting as your most reliable sleep companion,and usb-c is also included.
Timer function: Start the timer function according to the manual, and it can be automatically turned off after you or your baby are asleep to create a more comfortable sleeping environment.
Help baby fall asleep at any time: This product can help your baby fall asleep at any time. It does not require any app, wifi, or bluetooth.

Professional design: The mini body seamlessly integrates into the bedroom aesthetics, only the size of the palm of the hand can release a professional-grade sound field, built-in ASMR-level white noise algorithm, 30 seconds to guide the brain into relaxation mode, scientifically shorten the time to fall asleep by 45%. In addition, a variety of colors are available.

reviews.name: Rosalina martinez
reviews.title: Perfect for Sleep at Home and On the Go!
reviews.body: I am so happy with this portable baby sound machine! It is compact, lightweight, and easy to take anywhere. The sound quality is excellent, with soothing white noise that helps my baby fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer. The battery life lasts a long time, and it’s simple to recharge. I love that it can be attached to a stroller, car seat, or crib, making it perfect for travel and naps on the go. This has become an essential part of our daily routine, and I highly recommend it to any parent looking to create a calm sleep environment for their little one. 🌙👶⭐

reviews.name: Haley
reviews.title: Fantastic product! Every mom needs. Better than Hatch
reviews.body: Better than a Hatch! Holds charge forever! I've accidently left if playing in the car overnight and it still has lots of charge. Love all the different sounds and the volume control. I recommend this to every new mom when they ask about it. The ring to attach it to things is great too! I've put it in the infant carrier, head rest of the car seat, stroller, diaper bag, handle on the inside of the car for getting in and out. The ring is just the right side to be able to hang from pretty much anything

reviews.name: KC Kreations
reviews.title: An absolute travel necessity for naps on the go!
reviews.body: I bought this specifically for strollers and car rides, and it has quickly become one of my favorite baby gear purchases. It is incredibly lightweight, compact, and easy to clip onto just about anything. The battery life is amazing it easily lasts through a full day out without needing a charge. The sound is surprisingly rich and loud enough to mask noisy environments like grocery stores or restaurants so my little one can take a nap. It’s small enough to throw into any diaper bag without taking up space. And the controls are simple to use. If you want to maintain a nap schedule while out of t

reviews.name: Andrew Sender
reviews.title: Easy to use whit noise machine
reviews.body: It’s a great white noise machine for our little one. It’s reliable, simple, and portable. Volume control is also very easy to control.
